trades.reasoning: Score 100 with all four confirmation signals — MACD crossover, RSI in bullish zone (62), price above SMA-20, and volume surge — the only candidate meeting all four criteria indicating genuine institutional participation; deploying remaining cash above the $500 threshold.

decisions.briefing: Market is neutral today — S&P barely positive, NASDAQ slightly red — not the risk-on signal that would justify aggressive deployment. However, RGC is the one exception: it clears all four confirmation criteria including a volume surge, which is the highest-quality setup in the screener. With $577 in cash and four open slots, deploying into RGC at medium conviction is justified by the quality of the signal even on a flat tape. The remaining overbought candidates (most of the list has RSI above 70) are not worth chasing in neutral conditions.

market_education.summary_en: Markets were mixed to open Q3 2026, with the S&P 500 managing a slim +0.2% gain while the NASDAQ slipped -0.2%, reflecting a cautious rotation between growth and value at the start of the new quarter. The divergence is consistent with investors trimming extended momentum names — nearly the entire screener shows RSI above 70 — while reallocating into more defensive positions. With no major macro catalyst, trading volumes were subdued and breadth narrow, a classic hallmark of an indecisive session.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股2026年第三季首個交易日走勢分歧，標普500勉強收升0.2%，納斯達克則小幅下跌0.2%，反映投資者在季初謹慎地從成長股轉向價值股。這種背離走勢與市場對延伸動能股的獲利了結一致——本日篩選清單中幾乎所有個股的RSI均超過70——資金正重新流向防守性配置。在缺乏重大宏觀催化劑的情況下，成交量清淡、市場廣度收窄，是典型的方向不明盤面特徵。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Signal confirmation means requiring multiple independent technical indicators to agree before entering a trade. A single bullish signal can be a false alarm, but when RSI is in the bullish zone, MACD crosses above its signal line, price is above its 20-day average, AND volume surges all at once, it suggests real institutional buying rather than random noise. RGC today is the only candidate hitting all four — that's what separates a high-quality setup from the dozens of merely overbought stocks on the list.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 訊號確認是指在進場前，要求多個獨立技術指標同時發出一致的看漲信號。單一指標出現買入信號有時只是假突破，但若RSI處於看漲區間、MACD向上穿越訊號線、股價高於20日均線，且成交量同步放大——四項條件同時成立，代表有實質機構資金介入，而非隨機雜訊。今日RGC是唯一同時滿足四項條件的個股，這正是其有別於清單上其他大量超買股票的關鍵所在。
